debug_info.goal:
A : Finset ℕ
N : ℕ
hAN : A ⊆ range N
hA : ThreeAPFree ↑A
⊢ ∃ c > 0, ↑A.card ≤ ↑N / exp (-c * log ↑N ^ 12⁻¹)

      have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ exp (- (1 : ℝ) * log (N : ℝ) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := le_of_lt hexp

    simpa [div_eq_mul_inv] using (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (inv_le_one_of_one_le₀ hle) (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (N : ℝ)))
  exact le_trans hcard (by simpa using hdiv)

    exact exp_pos _
  have hexpge : (1 : ℝ) ≤ exp (-((1 : ℝ)) * log (N : ℝ) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := by
    have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ exp (-((1 : ℝ)) * log (N : ℝ) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := le_of_lt hpos
    exact le_trans (by norm_num) this
  have hle : (A.card : ℝ) ≤ (N : ℝ) / exp (-((1 : ℝ)) * log (N : ℝ) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := by
    have : (N : ℝ) ≤ (N : ℝ) / exp (-((1 : ℝ)) * log (N : ℝ) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := by
      simpa [div_eq_mul_inv] using
        (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (by
          simpa [one_div] using (one_le_inv₀ (le_of_lt hpos) |>.2 hexpge)) (by exact_mod_cast (Nat.cast_nonneg N))
    exact le_trans hcard this
  simpa using hle
